task_description: Implement Phase 4 (Worker Coordination) of NexusQueue: worker heartbeats with TTL, stuck job detection via janitor process, graceful shutdown with drain logic, and configurable concurrency control per worker.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds (all 3 workspaces). npm test passes 61/61 tests (10 phase1 + 9 phase2 + 21 phase3 + 21 phase4). Post-review fixes applied: janitor overlap prevention (ticking flag), error handling (try/catch with logging), and efficient slot-freeing (Promise.race replaces 50ms polling).
